spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the Structured Field list format for one or more Speculation-Rules rule document URL strings.

interactive.rationale: Preset and JSON editor changes rebuild the HTTP response and Express handler examples live.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The page promises canonical header generation and now includes both single-document and multi-document output.

edge_cases.rationale: The multi-doc preset shows two quoted URL strings separated by a comma and renders separate application/speculationrules+json route handlers.

design_system.rationale: Uses shared colors and associated form labels for the preset control and JSON editor.

summary: Resolved the multi-rule-doc follow-up. Chrome DevTools MCP on Chrome/148.0.0.0 verified /v131/exempt-speculation-rules-header-from-csp-restrictions/header-format/?verify=after-multi-doc: selecting the multi-doc preset generated Speculation-Rules: "/prefetch-rules.json", "/prerender-rules.json", displayed both rule documents, and emitted matching Express route examples.
